item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
whatever that means.. greetings online friends
well yeah
i don't really like the color purple but that looks cool i guess
(tom petty / bob dylan) ... there are young folk here
have
final destination
gotta love gas station boner pills
a lot of work then you don't see the results
as is tradition
good times
honestly, Radio Shack
wow i found a Trey meme. had to use it
mmm hmm
indeed
yeah i'm not calling that number
why is someone handling one??!!
working on my bog body
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Video dump and a rum and coke. How's your Saturday night going, Imgur?
item.description:
Please, good and kind people of imgur, what is the sauce?
Accurate
Durk Hardpeck
We're doomed
Safety third
Don't worry man, I've got another
Another attempt was made to not post videos that I've posted before. I have probably failed again.

item.dc:creator: romulanguy

item.title: Milton's Stapler
item.description:
As a Floridian...we prepare for another hurricane to strike next week... this one will impact my area far more than Helene did.
Regardless it looks like it's gonna affect the whole state. (Prayers for those in the Big Bend area still recovering from Helene)
My coping mechanisms are memes and puppers. But the name of the storm.... Milton... and my brain goes straight to Office Space.
I know it's dumb... but it made me laugh a little as I prep to go to the store.
Louie tax
item.dc:creator: Flutterbye82

item.title: Disney's "The Adventures of Ichabod and Mr. Toad" was released 75 years ago today (on Oct 5th, 1948)
item.description:
The Adventures of Ichabod and Mr. Toad (1949) - A Disney classic, based on the Washington Irving story "The Legend of Sleepy Hollow". Due to the war, it was part of a package feature (meaning it was cheaper to make one animated film instead of two) that also included an adaptation of "The Wind in the Willows". Ichabod Crane is a school teacher who arrives in the secluded Dutch community known as Sleepy Hollow, just up the Hudson river from NYC. Here his affections for Katrina van Tassel runs him afoul of the town bully Brom Bones... and the ghostly local legend who appears on Halloween night.
To increase the audience appeal, famous actors were utilized to narrate the stories. British actor Basil Rathbone (best known for Robin Hood and Sherlock Holmes) provided the narration for Mr. Toad, whilst the Oscar-winning singer Bing Crosby provided his... vocals... to Ichabod Crane.
The film would be the last cost-saving package feature, a year after its succes they would release "Cinderella" to much acclaim. Thanks to its success, other full-length films like "Alice in Wonderland" and "Peter Pan" developed and shelved in the early 40s would also resume. The character design for Cinderella was partially based on the design for Katrina Van Tassel's.
The bridge of the Headless Horseman
The grave of Washington Irving himself.
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Say hello to fellow travelers
item.description: I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
